subject: Dusk Warden

scope.reason: The required one-state pilot must validate before any full-state generation.

prompt: Dusk Warden, an original dark-fantasy 2.5D defense RPG guardian in blackened steel and ash-gray layered cloth, moonless silver edge accents, readable three-quarter isometric silhouette, braced idle combat stance, grounded proportions, no text, no logos, no copyrighted character likeness, no magenta pink or purple on the character. Render on a perfectly flat solid #FF00FF magenta matte with no shadows gradients texture glow or spill. Preserve smooth painterly 2.5D art; do not convert to pixel art, do not quantize, and do not remove the matte. One idle state pilot only.

attempt.stderr: ppgen 실패: 지원하지 않는 프로바이더입니다: god-tibo-imagen

providerDryRun.note: The provider request shape validates independently, but direct generation was not submitted because that would bypass the required PerfectPixel workflow.

provenance.nullReason: PerfectPixel rejected the required provider before request submission, so no provider job, generated output, asset license, digest, or output dimensions exist.

blockers.detail: The installed ppgen provider registry does not include god-tibo-imagen and rejects it during provider resolution.

The installed ppgen CLI exposes no extract-method flag, always removes the background, and always invokes frame pixel post-processing; it cannot satisfy extractMethod=none with no pixel-art conversion.
